name: Cherry Chocolate Baked Alaska Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Burgundy Cherry frozen yogurt (slightly softened)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake and cool the cake as directed on the package for two 9-inch round pans.
2. Reserve one of the layers for another use.
3. Freeze the remaining layer for about 2 hours, or until firm.
4. Cover a cookie sheet with aluminum foil.
5. Cut the frozen layer horizontally in half.
6. Place the bottom half on the cookie sheet.
7. Spread half of the yogurt over it.
8. Top with the remaining cake layer and spread with the remaining yogurt.
9. Freeze for about 4 hours, or until firm.
10. Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C).
11. Mix together the sugar and baking cocoa in a bowl.
12. In a medium bowl, beat the egg whites and cream of tartar on high speed until foamy.
13. Beat in the sugar mixture, one tablespoon at a time, until stiff and glossy.
14. Spread the meringue over the top and sides of the cake, sealing completely.
15. Bake for about 5 minutes, or until firm to the touch.
16. Serve immediately, or return to the freezer for about 2 hours and serve frozen.
